name: Wizard bubble bar
description: An adorably sparkly purple-hatted wizard bubble bar with a warm, unique scent of fennel oil, tangerine, and juniperberry — sweet, spicy, fruity, and utterly magical. Crumble under running water for a bubbling, enchanting bath.
archive_note: Originally released as a Halloween product, the Wizard bubble bar has reappeared periodically on the Lush Kitchen menu as a much-requested seasonal exclusive.
nostalgia_angle: A cult Halloween Kitchen favourite that fans hunt down each year, originally released as a Halloween product before becoming a coveted Kitchen reappearance.
throwback_reference: A Halloween bubble bar with roots in Lush's early seasonal product history, beloved for its whimsical wizard shape and distinctive fennel, tangerine, and juniperberry scent combination.
